zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne De Burgullion於大約1325年出生在英國諾福爾可諾維其時，她的父親Ralph de Burgullion38歲，母親Mrs Ralph Burguilon32歲。她於大約1339年與Ralph De Shelton III在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1375年享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne De Burgullion于大约1325年出生在英国諾福爾可諾維其时，她的父亲Ralph de Burgullion38岁，母亲Mrs Ralph Burguilon32岁。她于大约1339年与Ralph De Shelton III在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1375年享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne De Burgullion was born about 1325, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, her father, Ralph de Burgullion, was 38 and her mother, Mrs Ralph Burguilon, was 32. She married Ralph De Shelton III about 1339, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1375, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne De Burgullion est née environ 1325, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Burgullion, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mrs Ralph Burguilon, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph De Shelton III environ 1339, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1375, à l’âge de 52 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne De Burgullionが約1325年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで生まれた時，父Ralph de Burgullionは38歳，母Mrs Ralph Burguilonは32歳であった。約1339年にイギリスイギリスでRalph De Shelton IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1375年に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne De Burgullion(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Burgullion(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Ralph Burguilon(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1339년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ralph De Shelton III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1375년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne De Burgullion родилась около 1325 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph de Burgullion было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Ralph Burguilon, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph De Shelton III около 1339 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1375 г. в возрасте 52 лет.
